meaning: adj.中板的adv.[乐] 中等速度地,中板地
examples: Symphony No. 3, Pastoral: III. Moderato pesante.
Franz Joseph Haydn. Sonata In Eb Allegro Moderato First Half.
" moderato ! " he cried as they descended. and heaven knows there are hills enough between rome and florence by the way of aquapendente.
Fifteen years ago, an azzurro represented Italy in international sporting competitions and a moderato was a centrist.
When it was released in 1958, Moderato Cantabile divided critical opinion.
